title: Display Contact Admin Message for Unauthorized Page Access
story: As a shared user without permissions to certain pages, I want to see a clear message telling me to contact my administrator, so that I know why I cannot access the page and what to do next.
description: Replace blank pages and error messages with a user-friendly notification for shared users who lack permission to access certain pages (Metrics, Dictionary, Migration). The message reads: 'You do not have permission to view this page. Please contact your administrator for access.'
acceptance_criteria: Users without permission see 'Contact Admin' message instead of a blank page
Message displays on all permission-restricted pages (Metrics, Dictionary, Migration)
ux_changes: Clear 'Contact Admin' message replaces blank pages for unauthorized users.
middleware_changes: Permission checks on restricted pages now render a friendly message instead of a blank page or error.
comment_summary: Developer added the message and pushed to development. Screenshot provided.
